{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Branch Manager",
  "description": "Sundry Markets Limited &ndash; Marketsquare is Nigeria&rsquo;s emerging grocery retail chain &ndash; a place where Nigerians can go to find their trusted brands of groceries at the best prices. Marketsquare was conceived from a burning sensation to create a modern and relevant retail shopping experience for Nigerians and a more convenient way for people to get their everyday needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT), Anambra, Delta, Edo, and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are currently recruiting for dynamic and results-oriented Branch Managers to lead our team at various locations.
	In this role, the Branch Manager will direct day-to-day operations, ensure the delivery of exceptional customer service, and drive sales and profitability.
	The branch manager will be the driving force behind our branch&rsquo;s success, ensuring alignment with business objectives while fostering a culture of integrity and accountability.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and direct the branch team to align daily operations with strategic business objectives. Conduct regular staff meetings to communicate goals and provide guidance.
	Design and implement strategies to increase foot traffic and enhance profitability. Work with Department Managers to achieve periodic sales margins and gross profit targets.
	Collaborate with the Warehouse Manager and Buyer to optimize inventory levels. Ensure merchandise is ordered in line with reorder levels to reduce holding costs and prevent stockouts.
	Implement effective loss prevention strategies to minimize shrinkage by working closely with relevant process owners.
	Address customer and employee queries promptly. Support the training and development of branch personnel through coaching and performance monitoring.
	Ensure staff adherence to company policies and procedures. Provide regular reports on store activities and participate in stock count exercises.
	Drive and support E-commerce sales for the assigned branch.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Minimum of B.Sc./ HND in any related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of retail experience of which 5 years should be in leadership role
	Must have NYSC Discharged/Exemption or Exclusion letter
	Proven experience in retail management or as a Branch Manager.
	Strong understanding of inventory management, loss prevention, and profit margins.
	Excellent organizational, analytical, and time management skills.
	Outstanding verbal and written communication abilities.
	Ability to handle confidential information with the utmost discretion and integrity.
	Proficiency in reporting and presenting store performance data.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-21",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Branch Manager Job at Sundry Markets Limited




        
    

        
        Sundry Markets Limited – Marketsquare is Nigeria’s emerging grocery retail chain – a place where Nigerians can go to find their trusted brands of groceries at the best prices. Marketsquare was conceived from a burning sensation to create a modern and relevant retail shopping experience for Nigerians and a more convenient way for people to get their everyday needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT), Anambra, Delta, Edo, and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are currently recruiting for dynamic and results-oriented Branch Managers to lead our team at various locations.
	In this role, the Branch Manager will direct day-to-day operations, ensure the delivery of exceptional customer service, and drive sales and profitability.
	The branch manager will be the driving force behind our branch’s success, ensuring alignment with business objectives while fostering a culture of integrity and accountability.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and direct the branch team to align daily operations with strategic business objectives. Conduct regular staff meetings to communicate goals and provide guidance.
	Design and implement strategies to increase foot traffic and enhance profitability. Work with Department Managers to achieve periodic sales margins and gross profit targets.
	Collaborate with the Warehouse Manager and Buyer to optimize inventory levels. Ensure merchandise is ordered in line with reorder levels to reduce holding costs and prevent stockouts.
	Implement effective loss prevention strategies to minimize shrinkage by working closely with relevant process owners.
	Address customer and employee queries promptly. Support the training and development of branch personnel through coaching and performance monitoring.
	Ensure staff adherence to company policies and procedures. Provide regular reports on store activities and participate in stock count exercises.
	Drive and support E-commerce sales for the assigned branch.


Qualifications & Skills


	Minimum of B.Sc./ HND in any related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of retail experience of which 5 years should be in leadership role
	Must have NYSC Discharged/Exemption or Exclusion letter
	Proven experience in retail management or as a Branch Manager.
	Strong understanding of inventory management, loss prevention, and profit margins.
	Excellent organizational, analytical, and time management skills.
	Outstanding verbal and written communication abilities.
	Ability to handle confidential information with the utmost discretion and integrity.
	Proficiency in reporting and presenting store performance data.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

	Individuals with strong attention to detail and professionalism
	Team players who can thrive in a fast-paced environment
	Passion for quality service and continuous improvement.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Social Media Manager Job at Poweredup Consulting




        
    

        
        Poweredup Consulting - Our client, a dynamic and expanding restaurant, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Festac, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	Are you passionate about food, hospitality, and delivering exceptional customer experiences? We are recruiting on behalf of a dynamic and expanding restaurant, and we’re looking for skilled and dedicated professionals to join their team.


Key Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates must have prior experience in a restaurant or hospitality environment.
	Individuals with strong attention to detail and professionalism
	Team players who can thrive in a fast-paced environment
	Passion for quality service and continuous improvement.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Manager",
  "description": "Westbridge Industries Limited is committed to establishing itself as the leading provider of Lubricants, Agro-allied, Cargo transportation, Dredging operations, and Agro Products throughout the West African sub-region and across the African continent.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Oregun, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Business Manager would be responsible for overseeing the farm plantation&rsquo;s operations, improving efficiency, and ensuring the organization meets its financial and strategic goals.
	Responsible for interpreting and implementing strategic at the farm as business plan.
	Manage the entire farm team to carryout daily activities

Business Manager Job at Westbridge Industries Limited




        
    

        
        Westbridge Industries Limited is committed to establishing itself as the leading provider of Lubricants, Agro-allied, Cargo transportation, Dredging operations, and Agro Products throughout the West African sub-region and across the African continent.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager

Job Location: Oregun, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Business Manager would be responsible for overseeing the farm plantation’s operations, improving efficiency, and ensuring the organization meets its financial and strategic goals.
	Responsible for interpreting and implementing strategic at the farm as business plan.
	Manage the entire farm team to carryout daily activities
	Develop and nurture the operations of the farm to help achieve business objectives
	Develop initiatives and search for viable opportunities for business growth
	Participate in the development and implement the budget for assigned to the farm location
	Maintain extensive knowledge of current market conditions, market share and trends and prepare periodic reports on achievements on the farm.


Operations:


	To implement, maintain and ensure adherence to Operations Standards, Company Policies and Procedures and initiatives.
	To deliver excellent work through well trained and highly motivated teams.
	Ensure that thorough evaluation on the farm plants are being nurtured appropriately and in a timely manner.
	Ensure that daily operations of staff duties is carried out accurately.
	Management of farm staff: attendance, duties and other activities are done appropriately.
	To propose and prepare a performance schedule plan to meet business plan objectives of the farm.
	General operations and maintenance of the farm and business activities
	Ensure relevant checks and balances are in place and all staff KPI's are in-order.
	To pro-actively manage operational costs on a day-to-day basis through effective management of controllable costs, third party contractors and team members.
	Accountability for the whole employee life cycle of all employees. This includes managing the; performance of all employees by cultivating a team spirit, effective coaching and performance management.
	Overall responsibility over the safety of employees and guests by complying with company standards, Health and Safety and Environment legislation and meeting all other statutory requirements.
	To manage and operate security systems and processes to prevent loss and to ensure the security of cash, assets, and employees at all times


Requirements


	Bachelor Degree in Business Management, Marketing and Masters’ Degree in also related field.
	Minimum of 10 years of experience with at Least 5 Years in Management Level.
	Salary: Negotiable
	Strong leadership and decision-making ability
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Financial and analytical skills
	Problem-solving mindset
	Time management and organizational skills
	Knowledge of business operations and strategy
	People’s management
	Must be Male between 30 - 45 years old
	Must be willing to relocate to the farm plantation in Oyo State.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
